children.heading: Term of loan
children.label: a Term of loan
children.text: In the case of each loan commodity, a marketing assistance loan under shall have a term of 9 months beginning on the first day of the first month after the month in which the loan is made.section 8731 of this title

children.heading: Extensions prohibited
children.label: b Extensions prohibited
children.text: The Secretary may not extend the term of a marketing assistance loan for any loan commodity.
